brand.fontFamily: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", "Noto Color Emoji"

workflow.name: Configure API Access and Integrations
workflow.description: Generate API keys and connect third-party integrations to extend the agent's functionality and enable programmatic access.

steps.title: Navigate to Settings
steps.description: Click on the Settings link in the sidebar to access API and integration configuration.

steps.title: Access API Keys
steps.description: Select the API Keys option in the settings menu to manage your project's programmatic access.

steps.title: Create API Key
steps.description: Click the 'Create API Key' button to generate a new programmatic access token.

steps.title: Confirm API Key Creation
steps.description: Click the 'Create' button to finalize and generate the new API key.

steps.title: Close Success Modal
steps.description: Click the 'Close' button to return to the API Keys management page.

steps.title: Navigate to Secrets
steps.description: Click on the Secrets tab to manage third-party integration credentials and environment variables.

steps.title: Create Integration
steps.description: Click the 'Create Integration' button to start connecting a third-party service like 1Password.

steps.title: Enter Integration Token
steps.description: Enter your 1Password service account token to authorize the integration.

steps.title: Finalize Integration
steps.description: Click the 'Create Integration' button to complete the setup.
